description: Check out a branch into a separate directory so you can work on two branches at once
intents: work on two branches at the same time
check out another branch in a separate folder without stashing
have one branch in this folder and another in a sibling folder
open a second copy of the repo on a different branch
work on a hotfix without switching branches in my main checkout
two parallel working directories from one repo
i need to look at another branch without disturbing my current one
